title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: Joe Furnari opened the meeting, which was briefly delayed. Michael Donovan presented a tokenized design system for improved design velocity. Vinnie Micciche emphasized accurate content and messaging reflecting Strawid's evolution and addressing AI threats, requesting content approval. Harinder Bhinder suggested leveraging AI while highlighting human connection. Joe proposed generating two weeks of posts for Vinnie's review, which Vinnie supported.

decisions.description: Generate two weeks of social media posts for Vinnie's review before automation.
Messaging strategy to help dealers who don't know how to use AI, positioning Strawid as expert.

actionItems.task: Go through three documents and provide additional comments.
Generate two weeks of social media posts for Vinnie's review.

expectedOutcome.description: Approved social media content for two weeks.

tensions: Vinnie's repeated emphasis on content accuracy over design aesthetics.
Concern over losing a dealer to an AI bot, highlighting the threat of AI.
referencesToPast: Mention of 'three specific documents' for messaging.
Reference to 'old themes like "dealers need more leads"'.
Mention of recently losing a dealer to an AI bot.

contributions.description: Proposed generating two weeks of posts for Vinnie's review.
Presented tokenized design system and templates for social posts.
Emphasized paramount importance of accurate content and messaging.
Requested content approval to ensure quality and alignment.
Stressed messaging must reflect Strawid's evolution and address AI threat.
Suggested leveraging AI messaging while highlighting Strawid's human connection.
Provided helpful feedback on documents, earning praise.
Suggested helping dealers who don't know how to use AI.
Emphasized messaging needs to directly address the threat of AI bots.
